author: TonyMontana
content:
Also though it’s been a tough market I’m up $40k on the week want to make that clear.

You dont switch your strategy because one week is slow lol.

This is when you guys start strategy jumping and get caught up in noise.

Yes it’s slow right now, but the second the market shows the smallest amount of momentum everyone will rush back to the system.

Stop jumping systems or strategies, stick to one, master it, and only then will you see success over a long period of time.

author: TonyMontana
content:
I made $2,700 today.

But…

I messed up an EASY trade on QQQ that would have made me $30k or MORE.

The reason?

Not technicals, not strategy, but emotions.

Even after 7 years I made an emotional mistake today which caused me to miss a huge move.

This is very rare at the point I’m at in my career now.

However, when it does happen I want to be transparent and show you guys the full thought process.

This is a good watch: 👇

https://youtu.be/dBEz3JbCat4

author: TonyMontana
content:
As a reminder i would like to say the purpose of this accelerator is education.

Not SIGNAL botting or copying trades.

The goal is to show you the thought process behind the trades so you can see how pro traders visualize the markets.

That’s why it’s important to LEARN the system before trading.

For example if you understood the AMD setup today it would have been a super clean setup to take even if I didn’t take it.

Education first always.

LEARN THE SYSTEM, EVERYTHING WILL COME AFTER.

author: Bhargav
content: I have $153.78 key level if it breaks and retest this level, I will be buying it for the long.

author: Bhargav
content: HIgher Timeframe holds more value. So, I was waiting for the price to react at $153.40 level. Today I saw that the buyers are trying to hold that level, So now I'm just waiting to see that sellers give up and buyers step in. But when you are in swing position you have let the trade go -50% to -60% and you hold the position for a long period. Also, Since Googl doesn't has much volume like other tickers it moves slow.

author: Bhargav
content: Here's my levels, So you see the green line on the top  is Weekly level, which is at $168.64. But the white lines are also the Swings high but those are 1HR level. I will be just obeserving my trade on those 1HR levels to see price reactions. And for the contract I was just looking for 1 out of the money, because if price goes in your direction you want the price to be in the money if you hold for long time and also watch for ASK-BID spread. The difference between ASK-BID should not be big.

author: MVP Freestyle
content: Disney, a true stalwart, is showing a bottoming pattern on the weekly and monthly graphs, with the monthly price action bouncing off the 200 day SMA.  I took $100 November calls with 2 week out $90 puts.  I took the downside protection because it protects my position in the event of a 3%+ sell off.  About 90/10 long/short capital allocation ratio. A move to $100 in 30 days is a 60% return. Fundamentals and technicals are  lining up on this name. Great thing about these contracts is they go through Q3 earnings and the downside insurance is cheap.
